mapper.sql: id, name, subject, aliases, level, parent_id, children_ids, knowledge_base_id, creator_id, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge SET name = #{name}, subject = #{subject}, aliases = #{aliases, typeHandler=cn.yifan.drawsee.typehandler.JsonTypeHandler}, level = #{level}, parent_id = #{parentId}, children_ids = #{childrenIds, typeHandler=cn.yifan.drawsee.typehandler.JsonTypeHandler}, knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId}, creator_id = #{creatorId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM knowledge WHERE name = #{name} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM knowledge WHERE subject = #{subject} AND name = #{name} AND is_deleted = #{isDeleted} LIMIT 1
